title: geranium onaei f. albiflorum
intro: Geranium onaei f. albiflorum, also known as the white-flowered geranium, is a flowering plant species within the Geraniaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. The health benefits of Geranium onaei f. albiflorum include treating wounds, reducing pain and inflammation, and aiding in the management of digestive issues. Herbal preparations of the plant often involve making teas, tinctures, or infusions from its leaves, stems, and roots, which can be used to support overall well-being.
